result:
Implemented direct graph traversal commands in the CLI.

In [main.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main.go#L58), I added `links` and `backlinks` to command dispatch and usage output. The new handlers at [main.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main.go#L321) print one linked note ID per line, return `no links found` / `no backlinks found` when empty, and require the target note to exist. I also factored shared note lookup into [main.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main.go#L775), which `view` now uses too, so missing-note errors stay consistent.

In [main_test.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main_test.go#L1062), I added coverage for outgoing links, backlink discovery, empty-result output, missing-note errors, and `run()` dispatch for both commands. I also documented the new commands in [README.md](/home/changkun/null-codex/README.md#L7).

Verification is incomplete here: `go test ./...` could not run because `go` is not installed in this environment (`/bin/bash: go: command not found`).
